name: BlackByte 2.0 Ransomware
description: [BlackByte 2.0 Ransomware](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1181) is a replacement for [BlackByte Ransomware](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1180). Unlike [BlackByte Ransomware](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1180), [BlackByte 2.0 Ransomware](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1181) does not have a common key for victim decryption.
